title: Visualizing the Pigeonhole Principle
description: A flowchart demonstrating the logical proof and application of the Pigeonhole Principle, showing that if more items (pigeons) are placed into fewer containers (holes), at least one container must contain more than one item.
elements: Conclusion: At least one hole contains ≥2 pigeons
relationships: If number of pigeons exceeds number of holes, then the condition is true
The condition logically forces the conclusion
